ai_summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has submitted a routine regulatory filing to update the contact details of its Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) authorized to determine the materiality of events and information for disclosure purposes. This ensures compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations by identifying the Company Secretary & Compliance Officer and the Chief Financial Officer as the designated individuals. The document is administrative in nature, carries no direct material financial impact, and presents no discernible red flags.
